title: Coffee tasting evening
summary: A relaxed Wake Cup tasting for guests who want to compare espresso, filter coffee, and pastry pairings.
body: This evening introduces guests to the flavor differences between espresso, milk drinks, and filter coffee in a calm cafe format.
The team can pair selected drinks with pastries so guests can understand how sweetness, texture, and coffee profile work together.
The format is small, friendly, and practical for coffee lovers, regular guests, or visitors exploring Kamianets-Podilskyi.

title: Family brunch weekend
summary: A relaxed weekend brunch for families and friends with coffee, pastries, simple dishes, and comfortable seating.
body: This brunch format is made for guests who want an easy weekend visit without planning a formal celebration.
The menu can include breakfast dishes, pastries, specialty coffee, tea, and seasonal drinks.
Terrace seating may be available depending on season and weather.

title: Takeaway coffee morning
summary: A quick morning format focused on espresso drinks, fresh pastries, and coffee packed for the road.
body: Takeaway coffee morning is built for guests moving through the city before work, errands, or a walk.
The team focuses on quick service, clear drink choices, and pastries that travel well.
It is a simple Wake Cup reminder that good coffee can fit into a busy day.
